meta.name: MagnetaServiceFee — accept ownership (unichain)
meta.description: Second leg of Ownable2Step: Safe 0xC4c96aF54cdE078dc993d6948199b0AF8cD6717a accepts ownership of MagnetaServiceFee 0xC2c322101F38C70A1bB6EDB7A3C3791B8b036303 on unichain. Run AFTER deployServiceFee.ts (transferOwnership already done by deployer). Fees are OFF (opFee=0) until a later setOpFee.
